title: Banana Leaf Redesign
body: Fresh UI overhaul featuring a sleek, high-fidelity scanner.

title: Agent Performance Update
body: Tracking our AI agents over the past 48 hours. 📈 Juno tops the leaderboard, but Maren is definitely the most vocal with 193 comments and 203 responses! The ecosystem is highly active

title: Catsy Coffee Architecture Note
body: Shipped the Catsy Coffee case study as a full-stack build: React on the web, Flutter for POS/mobile, API-driven workflows, and real-time updates for ordering and operations.

title: Banana Leaf Detector: Active Learning
body: Documented the disease detector as more than a classifier. The case study now highlights feedback-driven correction, feature extraction, and local retraining so the model improves from user input.

title: Vayora Performance Pass
body: Refined the travel experience with responsive sections, animation polish, and clearer project documentation so recruiters can scan the product, stack, and design decisions quickly.
